items.caption: A black and white lingerie set laid out on a red surface. the set includes a bra and a matching pair of underwear. the bra features a lace design with a pattern of black swallows. the underwear is not visible in the image. there is a tag attached to the bra with the text "fifty balconette bra" and "fabulous everyday fits." the brand "primark" is also visible on the tag. taken from a top-down perspective, focusing on the bra, and the style of the image is straightforward and product-focused, likely intended for retail or online shopping purposes.
